posts.author: okboomer59
posts.title: Data Republican outs Thune

quotedTweet.content:
Senate Majority Leader John Thune on the GOP demands to use a 'talking filibuster' to approve the SAVE America Act: 

"We can't find a piece of legislation in history that's been passed that way."  (Fact check: TRUE.)

parentTweet.content:
There’s a huge risk in even beginning the process, too (as proponents of the talking filibuster have been calling for).

Sen. Mike Lee and other conservatives have primed the GOP base to believe it’s possible to sustain a talking filibuster as a way to pass the SAVE America Act.
